slides.body: A new study by Anaxi and Carnegie Mellon explores the complex valuation of data in modern AI systems. This research aims to clarify pricing and compensation rules for reusable AI components, addressing challenges to traditional internet revenue models.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout with black text on a white background. Accent blue (#2740eb) for headline. Left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Anaxi, Carnegie Mellon study AI data value, revenue models

slides.body: A TechRadar report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach promotes safer and more effective use by acknowledging their capabilities while managing the probabilistic nature of AI, ensuring necessary human oversight.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout with black text on a white background. Accent blue (#2740eb) for headline. Left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety
